scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/styles.css -o dist/styles.css --watch" "serve dist -l 3000"
scripts.build: npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/styles.css -o dist/styles.css --minify && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),v=require('../../package.json').version;fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',fs.readFileSync('src/index.html','utf8').replaceAll('__APP_VERSION__',v))" && cp src/privacy.html dist/privacy.html && cp src/sitemap.xml dist/sitemap.xml && cp src/robots.txt dist/robots.txt && cp src/llms.txt dist/llms.txt && rm -rf dist/assets && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp ../../assets/icon*.png ../../assets/icon.ico ../../assets/icon-rounded.png dist/assets/ && cp -r assets/screenshots dist/assets/screenshots
